basic_details.job_title: CDMO Gir Somnath Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Collector and District Magistrate Office Gir Somnath (CDMO Gir Somnath)
basic_details.short_information: Collector and District Magistrate Office Gir Somnath (CDMO Gir Somnath) has published the Contractual Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Contractual Legal Advisor position on a contract basis. Candidates up to 50 years of age with a Law Degree (Special) or a 5-year Law course after HSC, basic computer knowledge, proficiency in Gujarati and/or Hindi with translation ability, and 5 years of relevant legal experience are eligible to apply offline on or before 02-08-2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Law Degree (Special) or 5-year law course after HSC, Basic Computer Knowledge, knowledge of Gujarati and/or Hindi with translation ability, 5 years relevant legal experience
qualification.details: Law Degree (Special) or 5-year integrated law course after HSC from a recognized university under UGC Act. Basic computer knowledge as per Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules 1967. Sufficient knowledge of Gujarati and/or Hindi with translation ability. 5 years of experience as an Advocate/Attorney/Government Pleader in High Court or subordinate courts or in local self-government institutions/government boards/corporations/limited companies.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.girsomnath.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CDMO Gir Somnath Contractual Legal Advisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CDMO Gir Somnath Contractual Legal Advisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CDMO Gir Somnath Legal Advisor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CDMO Gir Somnath Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CDMO Gir Somnath Contractual Legal Advisor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CDMO Gir Somnath Legal Advisor Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Law Degree (Special) or 5-year integrated law course after HSC from a recognized university under UGC Act. Basic computer knowledge as per Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules 1967. Sufficient knowledge of Gujarati and/or Hindi with translation ability. 5 years of experience as an Advocate/Attorney/Government Pleader in High Court or subordinate courts or in local self-government institutions/government boards/corporations/limited companies.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.girsomnath.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CDMO Gir Somnath Legal Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CDMO Gir Somnath Contractual Legal Advisor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Contractual Legal Advisor post is 02-08-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Contractual Legal Advisor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Contractual Legal Advisor post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Contractual Legal Advisor position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Law Degree (Special) or a 5-year integrated law course after HSC, along with basic computer knowledge and proficiency in Gujarati and/or Hindi.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Contractual Legal Advisor post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Contractual Legal Advisor position is 50 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Contractual Legal Advisor role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 360000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Contractual Legal Advisor position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the required experience for the Contractual Legal Advisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have 5 years of relevant legal experience as an Advocate, Attorney, or Government Pleader.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Collector and District Magistrate Office Gir Somnath, which is https://www.girsomnath.nic.in.
